title: Unit 30: Compound Words and Prefixation - Grammar Podcast

script.text: Unit 30 explores the modular nature of Modern Greek: Compound Words and Prefixation. New words are built like Lego bricks by snapping smaller units together. Athina, what is the 'glue' that connects these parts?
Είναι το γράμμα όμικρον. Βιβλίο και πωλώ - βιβλιοπωλείο. Μαχαίρι και πιρούνι - μαχαιροπίρουνο.
Correct. This vocalic bridge is indispensable. Furthermore, we must master the Alpha Privative for negation. Athina, demonstrate the stress shift.
Γνωστός - άγνωστος, πιθανός - απίθανος. Ο τόνος ανεβαίνει στην τρίτη συλλαβή.
Indeed. We also have prefixes like 'Kse-' for reversing actions and 'Ksana-' for repetition. Athina, what is the 'Action Combo' for opening and closing?
Ανοιγοκλείνω. Ή πηγαινοέρχομαι. Δύο ρήματα μαζί με το όμικρον.

Exactly. Lastly, we must observe how prefixes like 'Kata-' intensify adjectives. This concludes our academic overview of Unit 30. Mastering compounds is essential for expanding one's Modern Greek vocabulary efficiently.
